hooks.command: echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current) | Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1)" && echo "Backlog: docs/_project_specs/00_oderply_backlog_v2.md — when asked for the next task, read it and find the first unchecked item" && echo "Testing backlog: docs/_project_specs/06_testing_backlog.spec.md — before implementing any task, find sections referencing that TASK ID and use those as TDD test cases"
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && echo 'File written — run tests: npm test --workspace=api' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -q '_project_specs' && echo 'A spec file was modified. Read docs/01_AGENTIC_DEV_SETUP.md and apply the inline-vs-reference framework to determine if CLAUDE.md needs updating.' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -q '.claude/skills' && echo 'A skills file was modified. Read docs/01_AGENTIC_DEV_SETUP.md and apply the inline-vs-reference framework to determine if CLAUDE.md needs updating.' || true
